gary_2026_07_01_future_of_paid_marketing.title: Future Of Paid Marketing - Search, AI & Funnels In 2027
gary_2026_07_01_future_of_paid_marketing.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_01_future_of_paid_marketing.summary: Gary's Guide: The Future of Paid Marketing: Search, AI, & Funnels in 2027 Wednesday, July 1st, 2026 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM Wix Offices, NYC Paid marketing is entering a new era. Search is changing. Creative is changing. Funnels are changing. AI is reshaping every stage of the customer journey, from ad creation to conversion. Join us for an exclusive after-work event at the Wix offices in NYC, bringing together performance marketers, growth leaders, founders, & AI builders to explore how AI is transforming the future of paid acquisition. What we'll cover: The future of search & advertising in an AI-first world How AI is changing creative production, campaign creation, & optimization The evolution of landing pages, funnels, & personalization New workflows & tools used by leading growth teams Practical lessons from teams already implementing AI today Networking with top NYC marketers, founders, & operators What to expect: Expert-led discussions & panels Live product demos Curated networking with top growth & marketing leaders Drinks, conversations, & practical takeaways Speakers & Agenda Speaker lineup & full agenda will be announced soon. Confirmed speakers include leaders from Google, high-growth technology companies, & the AI marketing ecosystem. Who should attend? Performance marketers, growth leaders, founders, agencies, demand generation teams, & anyone interested in how AI is reshaping paid marketing.

gary_2026_07_02_startup_mixer.title: Startup Mixer
gary_2026_07_02_startup_mixer.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_02_startup_mixer.summary: Gary's Guide: NYC Tech &Startup Mixer - brought to you by Startup+ We're putting founders, engineers, investors, recruiters, freelancers, & mentors in the same room for a night of straightup networking. No panels, no speeches-just real conversations. If you're testing an idea, raising cash, or hiring your first dev, this is the place to be. Newsletter (exclusive entry & event drops): https://newsletter.startupplus.club Sponsorship / press: email - contact@startupplus.club Volunteer (Complimentary Ticket): email - contact@startupplus.club Why swing by? - Meet 100+ builders & backers in one go - Swap stories, get quick feedback, share lessons learned - Spot future cofounders, investors, customers, maybe all three What's the setup? - We've got a dedicated space, & name tags at the door - Flash a business card or a LinkedIn QR-whatever works - Dress code? Businesscasual. Jeans totally fine. A quick word on Startup+ We kicked this off in 2021, in the middle of the pandemic, because Zoom mixers just weren't cutting it. Fastforward: 25k members, 75+ mixers, 12 pitch nights, & 6000 folks through the doors. We keep it simple-connect good people & let the magic happen. Headsup: capacity is capped. Only confirmed Luma RSVPs are admitted at the door. Walkins = no go. Fine print : By joining, you agree that photos/video taken may be used in future Startup+ promos. Also, you agree that the contact info collected will be used to send future event invites & promotions via newsletter/other event platforms. See you IRL!!!

gary_2026_07_08_startup_founders_investo.title: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
gary_2026_07_08_startup_founders_investo.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_08_startup_founders_investo.place: St Pat's Bar & Grill, 22 W 46th St
gary_2026_07_08_startup_founders_investo.summary: Gary's Guide: Join founders, investors, operators, engineers, & startup professionals for an evening of curated networking & meaningful conversations within the New York startup ecosystem. Designed to create high-quality connections, this event brings together people building, funding, & scaling startups across AI, SaaS, FinTech, HealthTech, ClimateTech, & other innovation-driven industries. What to Expect Curated Networking Structured networking sessions designed to help attendees connect with relevant founders, investors, & professionals based on their background & interests. Founder & Investor Conversations Discuss fundraising, product development, hiring, go-to-market strategy, growth, & startup operations with experienced founders, operators, & investors. Startup Pitch Session A limited number of founders will be selected to present their startup to attendees & participating investors. Each presentation is followed by audience feedback, Q&A, & opportunities for follow-up conversations. Open Networking Continue conversations, explore partnerships, discover opportunities, & build relationships with members of the New York startup community. Who Should Attend Startup Founders Angel Investors & Venture Capital Professionals Engineers & Technical Builders Product Managers & Startup Operators Recruiters & Hiring Leaders Sales & Business Development Professionals Startup Job Seekers Members of the NYC Technology & Innovation Community For Investors Investor participation is complimentary upon approval. Approved investors may receive access to curated startup introductions & opportunities to connect with founders within the Ascent Valley ecosystem. About Ascent Valley Ascent Valley is a global ecosystem connecting founders, investors, operators, & innovators through events, community, & startup networking initiatives. Our mission is to help ambitious builders create meaningful relationships, exchange knowledge, & access opportunities that accelerate startup growth.

You'll get the chance to master the art of making empanadas.nEngage in insightful conversations with fellow startup founders & venture capitalists in a relaxed & enjoyable atmosphere.nRoll the dough, choose your toppings, & bake your masterpiece while enjoying a selection of exquisite drinks that perfectly complement your culinary creations.nSpots are limited!nAbout us:nLazonLazo provides incorporation, tax, bookkeeping, fractional CFO & fundraising solutions for startups, powered by AI Agents & Human Experts. Through our Lazo One platform, we streamline essential operations, enabling founders to focus on growth while we manage the complexities. We help startups scale with confidence.nnVita WalletnVita Wallet is a fintech company founded in 2019, specializing in international transfers & payments for individuals & businesses across more than 50 countries. The platform supports local currency operations from Chile, Mexico, Argentina, & Colombia, offering transparent pricing & competitive exchange rates. Today, more than 300,000 people trust Vita Wallet as their digital wallet of choice.

gary_2026_07_10_ai_briefing_by_startup_g.title: AI Briefing By Startup Grind - C-Suite Gap In AI Readiness
gary_2026_07_10_ai_briefing_by_startup_g.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_10_ai_briefing_by_startup_g.summary: Gary's Guide: The AI Briefing is a high-velocity roundtable for decision-makers brought to you by Startup Grind. We bypass the hype by dissecting one high-signal industry deck with a room of vetted founders, operators, & enterprise executives. No lectures-just a 60-minute deep-dive into the tactics & data defining your next quarter. The gap between organizations that have built accountability structures around their AI & those that haven't is now measurable. Revenue growth reaches 58% among fully integrated organizations. Among those still piloting, top-line growth is only 15%. This session uses Grant Thornton's data to examine what it actually means to own an AI investment: who makes decisions, who measures outcomes, & what it costs when leadership can't agree on whether the organization is ready. We'll focus on the C-suite misalignment finding: CIOs & COOs within the same organization hold fundamentally different views on AI readiness, & the data shows that gap is producing real organizational failure.

gary_2026_07_11_founder_led_growth_the_c.title: Founder-Led Growth - The Content System That Brings Customers
gary_2026_07_11_founder_led_growth_the_c.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_11_founder_led_growth_the_c.summary: Gary's Guide: Agendan1:302:00 PM Arrival & Check-InnDoors open at 1:30 PM. Guests can arrive, settle in, & meet others before the first seminar begins. Early guests may also wait at the venue for the second session.n2:002:30 PM Seminar Session 1nA 30-minute seminar covering the main framework, examples, & takeaways.n2:302:45 PM Q&A for Session 1nAudience questions & discussion.n2:453:00 PM Intermission / Open ConversationnA short transition window before the second session begins.n3:003:30 PM Seminar Session 2nA repeat of the same 30-minute seminar for guests who prefer the later session.n3:303:45 PM Q&A for Session 2nAudience questions & discussion.n3:454:00 PM Open ConversationnGuests are welcome to stay after the seminars for casual conversation, follow-up questions, & deeper discussion.nNote: Seminar Session 2 is a repeat of Seminar Session 1. Guests only need to attend one session.nMost founders are told to post more content. That advice is expensive, vague, & usually wrong. If you're trying to grow a real business, content should not be a popularity contest, it should be a customer acquisition systemnThis seminar is a practical, direct look at how founders can use content to attract buyers, start conversations, & turn attention into revenue. Jun will walk through the core framework behind content that actually works, the kind that earns trust, creates demand, & brings in customers without wasting weeks guessing what to say nextnnThis session was widely well-received during New York Tech Week, & the response made one thing clear, founders are hungry for a better way to think about content. The ideas shared there helped cut through a lot of noise, & this time the conversation goes even deeper. Expect sharper examples, more usable tactics, & a clearer picture of how to build a content engine around growth, not vanitynnIf you've been treating content as a side task, a branding exercise, or a chore to keep up with, this event will challenge that thinking. The goal is simple, show you how to turn founder-led content into a repeatable system that supports sales & opens doorsnCommunity PartnernnSupermoonis a global network of 42,000 founders, builders, & investors, with over 200 in-person events hosted worldwide.nSupermoon operates Growth Engine, a NYC-based startup program supporting early-stage founders across deep tech, AI, fintech, & digital assets.

gary_2026_07_14_understanding_work_agenc.title: Understanding Work, Agency & Stewardship In Age Of Generative & Agentic AI
gary_2026_07_14_understanding_work_agenc.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_14_understanding_work_agenc.summary: Gary's Guide: All Tech Is Human (ATIH), in partnership with the Notre Dame-IBM Tech Ethics Lab, will host a two-part workshop series focused on perceptions, adoption, & experience with Agentic AI systems across the workforce. Led by Jen Weedon, ATIH Braintrust member, this series aims to surface both strategic & lived insights from across organizational levels, generating a more holistic set of data points to inform responsible research & practice in the enterprise space. On Tuesday, July 14, the conversation moves toward organizational leadership & governance. We will bring together 20-30 senior executives who are currently standing at the crossroads of automation. Whether you are navigating the complexities of adoption, facing regulatory bottlenecks, dealing with internal reorgs or downsizing, and/or weighing the decision to automate core processes, this executive roundtable offers a high-level forum to discuss the ethics of efficiency & the push towards AI-first or AI-native transformations. This workshop aims to surface the process, knowledge, tensions, & skill gaps. Together, we will explore how leadership can drive innovation while maintaining the trust & integrity essential to the modern enterprise. Express your interest below. This workshop will be four hours long. The workshop series will explore how different types of organizations are approaching Agentic AI - from those whose systems are already deployed, to those preparing for rollout, to those still in exploratory phases. By comparing lived experiences with Agentic AI to expectations across roles & organizational contexts, the workshops will surface concerns, decision-making realities, & unintended consequences. The goal is to understand better the dynamics shaping acute & sustained adoption, governance, & the cascading effects on the workforce. Day 2: Agentic AI from the Leadership Perspective (Organizational & Ecosystem Leaders) Agenda forthcoming

gary_2026_07_15_quantum_frontiers_respon.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_15_quantum_frontiers_respon.summary: Gary's Guide: All Tech Is Human & the Consulate General of Finland in New York are putting together a highly curated gathering for 75 individuals across civil society, government, industry, academia, & philanthropy. There will be two panel conversations & networking at the Finnish Consulate in New York, followed by a reception at the Finnish Residence near Central Park. Please express your interest below. All Tech Is Human takes a whole-of-ecosystem approach to tackling thorny tech & society issues & aligning our tech future with the public interest. We are building the crucial social infrastructure for the Responsible Tech ecosystem. Learn more at AllTechIsHuman.org & see all of our projects & initiatives here.

gary_2026_07_15_founder_dinner.title: Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_15_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_15_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Join us for an intimate evening with a highly curated group of Series A/B founders that are scaling at the most beautiful venue in NYC. Who Should Attend? Series A, B & above Why Attend? Honest conversations with the best founders at similar stages Tactical insights on fundraising, GTM, & scaling from peers who get it What Is Included? 4-course dinner with sommelier-paired wines Live pianist The builders behind some of the fastest-growing companies in the country Important Reminders: Dress Code: Business, smart casual Stay Connected: Follow us on Instagram or LinkedIn for updates on our community, events & opportunities. Photography Notice: By attending, you consent to being photographed or recorded for promotional purposes. About the Hosts & Sponsors: Brderless brings together the most extraordinary founders through a carefully curated community. Tabs is the AI-native revenue automation platform revolutionizing financial operations for venture-funded startups & high-growth B2B companies. Headquartered in New York, Tabs was founded in 2023 by a team of industry experts from Plaid, BCG, & PwC, & has quickly gained adoption across scaling teams seeking to escape legacy ERPs. Backed by prominent investors including Lightspeed, Primary Ventures, & General Catalyst, Tabs automates billing, collections, revenue recognition, & reporting - delivering speed, accuracy, & growth for modern startups. Kruze Consulting is a leading provider of accounting, finance, HR, tax credit, & tax consulting to seed & venture capital-funded startups. Kruze's clients have collectively raised billions in VC financing, & scores have been acquired by the largest public technology companies, including Apple, Cisco & JP Morgan. Kruze's advice & best-in-class financial systems make data-driven startup founders more productive.

gary_2026_07_16_the_startup_pitch_demo_s.summary: Gary's Guide: See the newest companies coming out of the NYC startup ecosystem. Provide peer feedback & network with ambitious founders at The Startup Pitch: Demo Showcase. This pitch & demo showcase gives you a first look at new technology from startups that are actively building & shipping product - sometimes even before VCs have seen them! The format is fast-paced & interactive. After each demo, the floor is open for questions, ideas, & honest feedback from the community. We welcome investors who want an unfiltered look at new technology & early-stage teams.

gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.title: Product Summit
gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.summary: Gary's Guide: A one-day summit for product leaders & professionals at the edge of innovation. Themes being explored: Leading Product Strategy Through Disruption Frameworks for navigating market uncertainty, maintaining cross-functional alignment, & building resilient product roadmaps in rapidly evolving industries. Building Trust in AI-Driven Products Best practices for integrating intelligent systems & autonomous features while prioritizing user confidence, data privacy, & transparent user experiences. Unlocking Product-Led Growth & Retention How to build self-sustaining ecosystems by combining continuous user discovery, community engagement, & operational discipline to drive enduring product growth. "Shifting Left" in the Product Lifecycle Practical frameworks for accelerating time-to-value & reducing risk by bringing continuous discovery, technical feasibility, & quality assurance to the earliest stages of development. The Product Manager of the Future How autonomous agents, large language models, & advanced tooling are reshaping product workflows, strategic decision-making, & the PM's role in human-computer interaction. Speakers from Past Events Our stage hosts senior leaders from global brands who are driving innovation at scale. Details of the Evening Agenda 2:50pm Check-in Opens 3:15pm Sessions Begin 5:45pm Closing Remarks 6:00pm Cocktail Reception Who Should Attend The Product Summit is designed for senior product leaders & builders who are driving innovation across the entire product lifecycle. This invitation-only summit brings together those operating at the intersection of emerging technology, continuous discovery, & product-led growth. What's Included Gourmet Light Refreshments - Enjoy a curated selection of artisanal bites & small plates, perfect for connecting with colleagues. Settle in for easy conversation & good company in a warm, welcoming space. With a thoughtful selection of beer & wine on hand, it's the perfect backdrop for winding down or catching up. Have dietary restrictions? To ensure we can accommodate your dietary needs, please inform us at least 48 hours before the workshop start date.

gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.title: NYC AI Nexus - Inaugural Demo Day
gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.summary: Gary's Guide: Join C10 Labs for one of our inaugural NYC AI Nexus Demo Day! C10 Labs is an Applied AI venture fund & studio supporting early-stage founders building at the intersection of AI, healthcare, biotechnology, robotics, advanced manufacturing, energy, & sustainability. The evening is designed to be high-impact & fast-paced: Rapid-Fire Pitches: 3 minute presentations from select C10 Labs cohort companies. Alumni Showcase: A look at our top portfolio companies & previous success stories. Networking Mixer: Direct access to the founders & the C10 team. We look forward to celebrating our NYC & talking about the NYC program. Our NYC cohorts are designed for idea-stage, pre-seed, seed & pre-series A teams looking to turn ambitious technical ideas into venture-backable companies through hands-on support, real-world validation, & deep operator expertise. Founders in our program receive: Applied AI curriculum & technical mentorship Access to domain experts, operators, & early customers Studio support around product, data, compute, & go-to-market A powerful NYC-based network of industry & ecosystem partners Come meet the C10 Labs team, connect with fellow builders, & learn more about what we're building in NYC.

gary_2026_07_16_ai_engineers_poker_game_.title: AI Engineers - Poker & Game Night

gary_2026_07_16_ai_engineers_poker_game_.summary: Gary's Guide: Join us for a private, invite-only Poker & Game Night for founders, engineers, & VCs building the next generation of AI companies. Come play poker, jump into games, & spend the night with some of NYC's top engineers, founders, & operators. Limited seats. Registration: require linkedin, company, job title, & include the following multiple choice (single select) How would you like to participate? Poker has a $100 buy-in & limited seating. For guests who select poker, seats are first come, first served at check-in. *Guests accepted into Fonzi Match Day will be guaranteed a poker seat. To join Match Day, visit Fonzi.ai click Get Hired, & apply. Options: Poker ($100 buy-in, seat not guaranteed) Hang Out & Other Games Hiring? Want intros to startups?

gary_2026_07_22_table_solns_for_founders.title: Table - Solns For Founders
gary_2026_07_22_table_solns_for_founders.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_22_table_solns_for_founders.summary: Gary's Guide: Turn your current startup challenge into real progress. Table is a community of 1,400+ founders, operators, advisors, & investors. In each session, participants surface real challenges, vote on what matters most, & engage in focused, fast-paced discussions to unlock practical solutions. In a single morning, you'll gain actionable insights, learn new perspectives, & meet peers also looking to move forward.

gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.title: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.place: St Pat's Bar & Grill, 22 W 46th St
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.summary: Gary's Guide: Join a curated startup networking event in New York bringing together founders, investors, operators, engineers, & startup professionals for an evening of meaningful conversations & valuable connections. Unlike traditional networking events, the focus is on real discussions, practical insights, & opportunities that extend beyond the event itself. The evening includes: Structured networking sessions covering fundraising, product development, hiring, go-to-market strategy, & startup growth. Startup pitches featuring selected founders presenting their companies to investors, operators, & experienced entrepreneurs. Open networking sessions designed to help attendees build relationships & continue conversations. Attendees include: Startup founders from pre-seed to Series A Angel investors & venture capital professionals Product managers, engineers, & startup operators Recruiters & hiring leaders Sales & business development professionals Entrepreneurs building in AI, SaaS, FinTech, & emerging technologies Selected startups will have the opportunity to pitch their companies & receive feedback from investors & experienced founders. Investor participation is complimentary upon approval. Hosted by Ascent Valley, a global community connecting founders, investors, & operators through events, networking, & startup initiatives. Whether you are building a company, seeking investment opportunities, hiring talent, or expanding your network, this event offers an opportunity to connect with New York's startup ecosystem.

gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.title: Junto Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 28, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form.

gary_2026_07_31_tech_happy_hour_by_start.summary: Gary's Guide: No pitches. No presentations. No agenda. This is our monthly tech mixer to connect with peers across the NYC tech & startup community - from founders & VCs to developers & designers. A happy hour for real conversations.

gary_2026_08_06_ai_engineers_poker_game_.title: AI Engineers - Poker & Game Night
gary_2026_08_06_ai_engineers_poker_game_.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_08_06_ai_engineers_poker_game_.summary: Gary's Guide: Join us for a private, invite-only Poker & Game Night for founders, engineers, & VCs building the next generation of AI companies.nWell have four poker tables running throughout the night, plus board games & video games including Smash Bros & Mario Kart.nComplimentary drinks & pizza are on us.nHigh signal, low pressure. Come play poker, jump into games, & spend the night with some of NYCs top engineers, founders, & operators.nLimited seats.nRegistration: require linkedin, company, job title, & include the following multiple choice (single select)nHow would you like to participate?nPoker has a $100 buy-in & limited seating. For guests who select poker, seats are first come, first served at check-in.n*Guests accepted into Fonzi Match Day will be guaranteed a poker seat. To join Match Day, visit Fonzi, click Get Hired, & apply.nOptions:nPoker ($100 buy-in, seat not guaranteed)nHang Out & Other GamesnHiring?nWant intros to startups?

jc_culture_10003557_2026_07_01_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003557_2026_07_01_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003557_2026_07_01_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_39719_2026_07_04_tirai_a_solo.title: Tirai – A Solo Bharatanatyam Showcase | July 4th, Jersey City
jc_culture_39719_2026_07_04_tirai_a_solo.label: Art / Culture
jc_culture_39719_2026_07_04_tirai_a_solo.place: ART HOUSE, 345 MARIN BLVD, JERSEY CITY
jc_culture_39719_2026_07_04_tirai_a_solo.summary: Bharatanatyam in its most intimate form – one dancer, live Carnatic music, and the eternal question of what lies beyond the veil. Tirai is a solo Bharatanatyam showcase performed by Sneha, a dancer and teacher with nearly 30 years of practice, accompanied by a live Carnatic ensemble. The performance traces the soul’s journey through invocation, surrender, and the dissolution of illusion – weaving together classical movement, rhythm, and storytelling in an intimate black box setting. Bharatanatyam is a classical Indian dance tradition rooted in centuries of art, music, and devotion, and Tirai brings this living tradition to Jersey City in a deeply personal offering. This show is for anyone who loves the arts, is curious about Indian classical dance, or simply wants to start their Independence Day with something meaningful and beautiful. No prior knowledge of Bharatanatyam is needed – just an open heart.

jc_culture_40201_2026_07_04_july_4th_fir.title: July 4th Fireworks
jc_culture_40201_2026_07_04_july_4th_fir.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_40201_2026_07_04_july_4th_fir.place: Exchange Place, MONTGOMERY ST BETWEEN HUDSON ST. AND GREEN ST.
jc_culture_40201_2026_07_04_july_4th_fir.summary: The full day of family-friendly festivities will once again draw tens of thousands of attendees, with over 60 vendors, 3 DJ stages, 2 beer gardens and a Kids’ Zone with activations and bounce castles. The Independence Day celebrations are capped off with breathtaking fireworks over the Hudson River with a picturesque backdrop of the NYC skyline. The celebration kicks off at 12:00 p.m. at Exchange Place. The night will conclude with a spectacular fireworks show, beginning at 9:30 p.m., lighting up the Hudson River synchronized to a patriotic soundtrack and visible across the waterfront. jc_culture_39112_2026_07_10_the_world_on.title: The World on Central Corridor Crawl
jc_culture_39112_2026_07_10_the_world_on.label: Parks / Outdoor
jc_culture_39112_2026_07_10_the_world_on.place: Central Avenue, 370-437 Central Ave,Jersey, Jersey City
jc_culture_39112_2026_07_10_the_world_on.summary: Grab a bite, explore the avenue, cheer on your team, and support the businesses that make Central Avenue one of Jersey City’s most vibrant destinations. “The World on Central” will activate one of Jersey City’s most diverse commercial corridors. In partnership with the Central Avenue Special Improvement District (CASID), this event is designed to drive foot traffic, promote local businesses, and position the Jersey City Heights as a regional destination for cultural celebration and economic activity. Friday, July 10: The World on Central Corridor Crawl 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM Start the weekend on Central Avenue with a World Cup-inspired crawl through the district! Participating businesses will show the 3:00 PM quarterfinal match, with themed specials, festive sidewalk moments, and family-friendly activities keeping the corridor buzzing. Event Policies No re-entry prohibited. Supervision required for children under 12. Event may be photographed or recorded. Allowed/Prohibited items for Event Prohibited Items Outside Food or Beverages Weapons/No CCPS Illegal Substances Drones Fireworks or Explosives Pets (except service animals) Lawn Chairs SECURITY SCREENING REQUIRED All guests are subject to magnetometer screening and bag inspection. Note that any items you bring to The World on Central could be subject to search. Please remember to keep bags, packages, strollers, etc. in sight. Do not leave any belongings unattended at any time.

jc_culture_40291_2026_07_11_the_world_on.title: The World on Central Watch Party & Celebration
jc_culture_40291_2026_07_11_the_world_on.label: Parks / Outdoor
jc_culture_40291_2026_07_11_the_world_on.place: Central Avenue, 370-437 Central Ave,Jersey, Jersey City
jc_culture_40291_2026_07_11_the_world_on.summary: It’s soccer, culture, food, music, and Jersey City energy all in one unforgettable celebration. “The World on Central” will activate one of Jersey City’s most diverse commercial corridors. In partnership with the Central Avenue Special Improvement District (CASID), this event is designed to drive foot traffic, promote local businesses, and position the Jersey City Heights as a regional destination for cultural celebration and economic activity. Saturday, July 11: The World on Central Watch Party & Celebration 3:00 PM – Midnight Saturday’s event takes over Central Avenue with a full-scale World Cup watch party and cultural celebration. Watch the quarterfinal double-header on a giant LED wall, then experience a lineup of music, DJs, cultural performances, live art, mural painting, food, and family fun. Event Policies No re-entry prohibited. Supervision required for children under 12. Event may be photographed or recorded. Allowed/Prohibited items for Event Prohibited Items Outside Food or Beverages Weapons/No CCPS Illegal Substances Drones Fireworks or Explosives Pets (except service animals) Lawn Chairs SECURITY SCREENING REQUIRED All guests are subject to magnetometer screening and bag inspection. Note that any items you bring to The World on Central could be subject to search. Please remember to keep bags, packages, strollers, etc. in sight. Do not leave any belongings unattended at any time.

jc_culture_40501_2026_07_11_earlybirds_c.label: Art / Culture
jc_culture_40501_2026_07_11_earlybirds_c.place: WHITE EAGLE HALL, 337 NEWARK AVE., JERSEY CITY
jc_culture_40501_2026_07_11_earlybirds_c.summary: Join us for an unforgettable night at the **Earlybirds Club – Jersey City**! Set against the vibrant backdrop of White Eagle Hall, this live performance promises to be a celebration of music and community. The venue, known for its warm atmosphere and rich history, will come alive as the Earlybirds Club takes the stage, inviting you to immerse yourself in their captivating sound and infectious energy. Whether you’re a longtime fan or new to their music, this event is the perfect opportunity to connect with fellow music lovers in Jersey City. Don’t miss out on the chance to experience an evening filled with great vibes and unforgettable moments. Grab your friends and secure your spot at the **Earlybirds Club – Jersey City White Eagle Hall**—you won’t want to miss this!

jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.title: Hamilton Park Farmers Market 2026
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.title: Club 1BD – Jersey City
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.label: Art / Culture
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.place: WHITE EAGLE HALL, 337 NEWARK AVE., JERSEY CITY
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.summary: Get ready to immerse yourself in an electrifying night at **Club 1BD – Jersey City**! Join us at the iconic **White Eagle Hall**, where the vibrant atmosphere and stunning architecture create the perfect backdrop for an unforgettable concert experience. As the beats drop and the lights dance, CLUB 1BD will take you on a journey through the pulsating world of techno and electronic music, igniting your senses and keeping you on your feet all night long. Whether you’re a die-hard electronic music fan or just looking for a night of fun, this event promises to be a highlight of your calendar. So gather your friends and prepare for an evening filled with energy, excitement, and incredible sounds. Don’t miss out on this chance to be part of something special—secure your spot now and get ready to rave at **Club 1BD – Jersey City**!
